chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-2813 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.12759/2024 2.For hearing of main case. 28.03.2025 Mr.Ovais Ali Shah, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms.Mehreen Ibrahim, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for Respondent. Per learned counsel, provisional release was ordered herein subject to final outcome of relevant proceedings before the Collector Appeals. Learned counsel states that this petition may be disposed of with directions that the fate of the security be subject to the outcome of the proceedings before Collector Appeals. Learned counsel for the respondent Department articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that this petition may be disposed of in such terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
